nodes.label: Synapse count of the oldest living organism = what the Ark preserves/reseeds.
nodes.norm_label: synapse count of the oldest living organism = what the ark preserves/reseeds.

nodes.label: GENESIS System
nodes.rationale: Split into a Python neuromorphic physics backend and a vanilla-JS observation deck connected over a single WebSocket (ws://host:8085).

nodes.label: neuromorphic_engine.py
nodes.rationale: Hot path SNN simulator compiled to machine code with Numba @njit(cache=True); holds allocator, genome decoder, sensory encoder and world_tick_numba.

nodes.label: genesis_lab.py
nodes.rationale: Owns all global NumPy state, the deep-time sim_loop, reproduction/mutation, the Elite Ark, and the asyncio/websockets server.

nodes.label: RAM Substrate (Space = RAM)
nodes.rationale: Space is literal RAM: a 1D toroidal uint8 array of RAM_SIZE=65536 bytes; position is a byte address, movement is pointer arithmetic mod RAM_SIZE.

nodes.label: Food (0x55 memory byte)
nodes.rationale: Food is the byte value 0x55, seeded only into empty (0x00) cells; consuming one yields CYCLES_PER_EAT_GAIN cycles.

nodes.label: Global Heap (shared computational matter)
nodes.rationale: Neurons/synapses/genomes for the whole universe live in flat global arrays; each organism mallocs contiguous blocks, so fragmentation is itself a spatial hazard.

nodes.label: Genome-Encoded SNN Organism
nodes.rationale: A byte-string genome parsed into receptor/neuron/synapse records, decoded into a sparse LIF network with fixed 15-input/14-output I/O layer plus variable hidden neurons.

nodes.label: RECEPTOR_MARKER (receptor protein)
nodes.rationale: 195, 10-byte DNA-encoded plasticity profile (A_PLUS, A_MINUS, TAU_P, TAU_M, V_REST, V_RESET, TAU_DEFAULT, SPIKE_RATE_MAX).

nodes.label: GENE_MARKER (synapse)
nodes.rationale: 161, 4-byte synapse (src,dst,weight) where weight maps a raw byte to float(w)-128 in [-128,127].

nodes.label: Leaky Integrate-and-Fire Neuron
nodes.rationale: float32 voltage leaks toward v_rest, fires at threshold, resets to v_reset, refractory TAU_REF=1; input neurons fire stochastically proportional to sensed value.

nodes.label: Spike-Timing-Dependent Plasticity (STDP)
nodes.rationale: Hebbian: pre-before-post potentiates, pre-after-post depresses, clamped to [-128,127]; per-receptor amplitudes/time-constants are DNA-encoded.

nodes.label: Lamarckian Consolidation
nodes.rationale: At reproduction each synapse weight byte is blended 50/50 with the STDP-learned weight, so acquired plasticity is partially heritable rather than reset to DNA each generation (a Lamarckian channel atop Baldwin lifetime learning). The 50/50 constant is a Rule 17 target for DNA-encoding.

nodes.label: Baldwin-style Lifetime Learning
nodes.rationale: Lifetime STDP changes held in the runtime weight array; without write-back this is Baldwinian in-lifetime learning.

nodes.label: Observation Deck (Frontend)
nodes.rationale: Vanilla-JS dashboard rendering the 65536-byte RAM as a folded 256x256 canvas plus KPI tiles, extinction chart, D3 Brain Analyzer, Oracle Terminal, and Library of Genesis injector.

nodes.label: Thermodynamics = CPU Cycles
nodes.rationale: Energy is execution cycles drained per action (ATP_MAX ceiling); costs are honest raw-cycle counts (one executed operation debits one cycle, Rule 15/17) with no arbitrary discounts. Synapse/plasticity costs are activity-gated so the substrate rewards many synapses firing sparsely (20W paradigm), not merely few synapses.

nodes.label: Computational Viscosity (Rule 13)
nodes.rationale: Local code density sets a stall probability (up to 0.5); stalled steps burn maintenance energy but do no compute. Later refixed (Result Exp6 audit) to key on total footprint (neurons+synapses) rather than synaptic density, which had perversely rewarded idle-neuron bloat.

nodes.label: Architecture-Derived Compute Latency
nodes.rationale: Each organism runs per world-tick as many LIF substeps as its own synapse graph is deep (g_org_lif_steps). Replaced the population-coupled step pool (steps=GLOBAL_CYCLE_POOL/population), which was un-physical (burn depended on others alive) and a death-spiral; makes Rule 7 efficiency emerge (mean depth selects 8->2).

nodes.label: Cosmic Radiation (Entropy)
nodes.rationale: Two random bit-flips per tick inside living genomes (germline mutation) rather than the mostly-empty arena where ~99% of flips landed in vacuum; heritable thermal entropy error-correction must out-run. Limitation: phenotype decoded once at spawn, so a flip alters offspring not the running brain.

nodes.label: Elite Ark (Rule 14)
nodes.rationale: sim_loop tracks the highest-age living genome; on total extinction the universe reseeds (~300 organisms) from mutated copies, checkpointed to Brain/Brain.npz, to guarantee strictly ascending evolution.

nodes.label: Reproduction & Mutation (mutate_dna)
nodes.rationale: Insertion/deletion/gene-duplication 5% each else point mutation at ~1/genome_length; bytes 0-1 (base receptor marker) are protected so a lineage cannot lose all STDP in one flip. Growth-biased (~+0.4 bytes/replication).

nodes.label: Oracle Uplink & Curriculum
nodes.rationale: User can broadcast an 8-bit character (inputs 7-14), read back the Elite's vocal-cord output, and inject ASCII books as byte patterns; the still-human-in-the-loop scaffold toward the Autotelic Imperative.

nodes.label: CYCLES_PER_EAT_GAIN (meal value)
nodes.rationale: Default 15000 (env GENESIS_EAT_GAIN); the books economy sets it to 16 so mindless grazing is bare subsistence. An un-derived Rule 17 constant under review (Roadmap P4).

nodes.label: Emergent Efficiency Selection (Rule 7)
nodes.rationale: Because neuron/synapse work is billed at true rate (formerly discounted to 0.1x, making brain size ~10x too cheap), a leaner brain retains more energy and out-reproduces a costlier one. Selected emergently by thermodynamics, never by a fitness metric; elite_iq=age/footprint is observation-only and must never feed selection (Rule 5/9).

nodes.label: 20 W Brain Paradigm / Prime Directive (Rule 6)
nodes.rationale: Target of brain-like ~20 W efficiency achieved by making the substrate physics reward many synapses firing sparsely, so sparse efficient neural computation is a thermodynamic necessity for survival.

nodes.label: Autotelic Imperative (Rule 9)
nodes.rationale: End-state where human-supplied food/oracle/curriculum are replaced with agent-generated survival problems (predation, trade, defence).

nodes.label: Raw Hardware Reality Mapping
nodes.rationale: Every environmental quantity is mapped to a raw hardware reality: space is a 65536-byte toroidal memory ring, energy is CPU execution cycles, food is a memory byte (a byte is stored energy), computational hazard is synaptic-density drag. No quantity is an abstraction.

nodes.label: Replication Trap
nodes.rationale: Failure mode of a-life systems (Tierra, Avida) where an environment rewarding only copying speed breeds efficient replicators, not cognition; GENESIS physics are designed to escape it.

nodes.label: Evolvable Neuro-Physics (Meta-Learning)
nodes.rationale: STDP amplitudes/time-constants, thresholds, spike-rate ceiling and resting/reset potentials are all DNA-encoded per receptor, so organisms evolve the equations of their own learning; there are no global learning constants.

nodes.label: Graded Plasticity (STDP_SCALE)
nodes.rationale: Raw receptor amplitudes (0-255) scaled by STDP_SCALE=8 so a single spike changes a weight by <=~12% of range, preventing bang-bang saturation against a 256-wide weight range.

nodes.label: Conservation of Compute (Global Cycle Pool)
nodes.rationale: Per-tick LIF-step budget is global (steps=3000/population): mass replication dilutes everyone's compute, coupling population to a fixed energy budget (bounded boom-bust). Later retired in favour of architecture-derived per-organism latency because it was un-physical and a death-spiral.

nodes.label: Fossil Pool with Horizontal Gene Transfer
nodes.rationale: Up to 12 distinct elite fossils retained; on total extinction the universe reseeds by crossover (HGT) between two fossils plus mutation, a more bottom-up recovery than cloning one genome.
nodes.norm_label: fossil pool with horizontal gene transfer

nodes.label: smoke_test.py (engine harness)
nodes.rationale: Headless harness driving world_tick_numba directly (no websocket, no infinite loop) and processing births as sim_loop does; used for throughput and A/B efficiency characterisation.

nodes.label: Life by Reading (Book Economy)
nodes.rationale: Prime Directive's first rung: gain energy by correctly reading a book-symbol rather than eating 0x55 (which breeds mere survivors/weeds). Demonstrated: with food off, at sufficient read reward a population survives fed purely by reading (~95% echo accuracy) - first energy earned by a cognitive task, not consumption.

nodes.label: Reading Eye + Echo Reflex
nodes.rationale: 8-bit reading eye (inputs 15-22 = the 8 bits of the byte under the pointer) plus a seeded echo reflex (two max-weight copy synapses per bit) and a stationary solve-the-symbol reward (partial credit = correct_bits - wrong_bits).

nodes.label: Arithmetic Frontier (Prediction vs Echo)
nodes.rationale: Distinct prediction reward for anticipating the symbol stepped onto (computing 1+1=2, not echoing). Seeded reader scores 147-187 echo reads but exactly 0 correct predictions: literacy is solved, reasoning (working memory + arithmetic) is unsolved and must emerge.

nodes.label: max_ark_age Fossil-Capture Freeze Bug
nodes.rationale: max_ark_age was a persistent all-time record set once before the loop and never reset, so after the first golden era remember_fossil() never fired; the fossil pool froze onto one lineage. Primary driver of zero ascension; fixed 2026-07-10 by resetting per era.

nodes.label: Monoculture Reseed
nodes.rationale: Each reseed draws ~300 organisms from <=12 near-clonal fossils; the cohort is >95% genetically identical, shares one physics/STDP header, and starts with identical initial_energy and age 0, giving synchronised burnout.

nodes.label: Metabolic Death-Spiral
nodes.rationale: dynamic_lif_steps = GLOBAL_CYCLE_POOL/alive_count makes each survivor burn faster as population falls, and extinction is only detected at alive_count==0 (no partial path), giving instantaneous total wipes - the anti-pattern Rule 10 forbids.

nodes.label: Brain-Size Bloat Ratchet
nodes.rationale: Not a memory leak: growth-biased mutate_dna (~+0.4 bytes/replication) plus the Ark preserving the longest-lived (bloated) genomes ratchets mean neuron/synapse counts up each era, halving throughput and defeating Rule 7 efficiency selection because longevity tracks the seed buffer, not efficiency.

nodes.label: Deep-Time Clockwork Extinction/Ark Collapse Loop
nodes.rationale: Total-population extinction recurs every ~8640 LIF-time units with sigma~0.5%, population holds ~272-357/600 with no upward trend across ~70 cycles (no ascension), throughput decays ~12500->4500 ticks/s. The population is not food-self-sustaining; it coasts on the seed buffer and is resurrected on a timer by the Ark, which masks the failure.

nodes.label: Food-Seeking Sense
nodes.rationale: Two sensory inputs report local 0x55 density ahead vs behind the pointer (a ±16 scan charged 32 cycles/tick). Under uniform-random seeding it yields no survival advantage (no spatial gradient to climb); its value is contingent on patchy food (Rule 10 gradient).

nodes.label: Text-Seeking Sense
nodes.rationale: In books mode the ahead/behind seek-scan (SEEK_TEXT) targets printable symbols so the ancestor's food-seek wiring becomes a text-seeker for free; passages cluster so unlike uniform food they yield a real gradient to climb. Raised encounter fraction 0.00->0.38.

nodes.label: Population Self-Sustainability
nodes.rationale: The open milestone: survive on renewable income with no Ark resurrection. Sweeps show survival scales with the seed buffer (coasting, not living on income) and that food scarcity is not the binding constraint - metabolic burn vastly exceeds achievable food income until the eat-gain/burn economy is rebalanced.

nodes.label: Economy-Rebalance Sweep (eat_gain_sweep.py)
nodes.rationale: Raising CYCLES_PER_EAT_GAIN (env GENESIS_EAT_GAIN) closes the loop: at 4096 on a food carpet the first self-sustaining population appears (energy climbs, Ark OFF). Confirms the wall was the eat-gain/burn economy and is crossable; large values are too lush (no selective margin).

nodes.label: Graph Physics Engine (genesis_engine.py / DynamicBrain, deleted)
nodes.rationale: Nodes predicting neighbours' states to earn energy; showed Darwinian selection, Red-Queen coevolution, catastrophe/overfitting tests and a supervised language experiment. Superseded because it was an abstract graph, not hardware, and the language result was supervised.

nodes.label: 1D Opcode Soup (turing_engine.py, deleted)
nodes.rationale: Self-replicating byte programs (OP_SPLIT, OP_ABSORB, CATALYZE...), cosmic radiation, thermodynamic zones, viscosity and a multiverse GA; produced extinction waves, junk-DNA shields, vacuum parasites. Superseded because it rewarded replication not cognition and the multiverse GA was a top-down God script (Rule 5 violation).

nodes.label: 2D Grid SNN Engine (deleted)
nodes.rationale: 64x64 toroidal world with LIF+STDP and an age-based Elite Ark. Superseded because the 2D grid was a video-game abstraction (Rule 15 violation).

nodes.label: 1D RAM Neuromorphic SNN (Current Substrate)
nodes.rationale: The 2D grid replaced by a literal 65536-byte RAM ring; organisms are genome-encoded sparse SNNs on a shared global heap with DNA-encoded receptor proteins, an Oracle uplink and a curriculum injector. The fourth and current of four superseded substrates.

nodes.label: Tectonic-Gradient Principle (Rule 10)
nodes.rationale: Forbids instantaneous, unpreventable total wipes because they prevent learning; hazards should be gradients organisms can evolve against (spatial refugia / partial die-off), not all-or-nothing extinction.

nodes.label: GENESIS Design Rules
nodes.rationale: The numbered operating rules governing the project (5 Intelligent Ancestor/no God script, 6 Prime Directive, 7 emergent efficiency, 9 Autotelic Imperative, 10 Tectonic-Gradient, 11/13 sparsity, 14 Elite Ark, 15 raw hardware, 16 honesty, 17 no magic constants).

nodes.label: Rule 5: Intelligent Ancestor (No God Script)
nodes.rationale: Seed a working reflex for evolution to refine rather than imposing a top-down God script; forbids wiring dashboard metrics (elite_iq) into selection.

nodes.label: Rule 15: Raw Hardware Physics (No Video-Game Abstraction)
nodes.rationale: Every environmental quantity must be a raw hardware reality, not a game abstraction; one executed operation debits one honest cycle.
nodes.norm_label: rule 15: raw hardware physics (no video-game abstraction)

nodes.label: Rule 17: No Un-derived Magic Constants
nodes.rationale: Hand-tuned constants (0.1 idle discount, CYCLES_PER_EAT_GAIN, 50/50 Lamarckian blend, STDP_SCALE) must be derived from real footprint or DNA-encoded rather than arbitrary.

nodes.label: Rule 16: Honest Record-Keeping
nodes.rationale: Results must describe only what the live engine measurably does; emergent cognition is a goal, not a demonstrated result. Stale claims from deleted engines are removed.
